# Fyn — agent and developer index

> Fyn (Find Your Nest) is an independent, open-source property-search service for Spain. It gives AI agents one normalized MCP tool for searching multiple public property portals.

## Use Fyn when

- A user wants to buy or rent property in Spain using natural-language criteria.
- An agent needs normalized results, source attribution, direct listing URLs, match explanations, and per-source diagnostics.
- A search should cover several Spanish portals without separate portal-specific integrations.

## Do not use Fyn for

- Purchasing, reserving, valuing, or legally verifying a property.
- Assuming a listing is current: agents must show the source URL and tell users to verify details with the source portal.
- Sending personal or sensitive information. Search criteria are sent to Fyn and relevant public listing sources.

## Integration

- [Developer guide](https://fynfyn.top/developers)
- [Full agent documentation](https://fynfyn.top/llms-full.txt)
- [OpenAPI description](https://fynfyn.top/openapi.json)
- [MCP server card](https://fynfyn.top/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json)
- [Authentication guide](https://fynfyn.top/auth.md)
- [Markdown homepage](https://fynfyn.top/index.md)
- [Repository and agent instructions](https://github.com/AlejandroMI/fyn)

## Primary endpoints

- MCP Streamable HTTP: `https://fynfyn.top/mcp`
- MCP discovery alias: `https://fynfyn.top/.well-known/mcp`
- Health: `https://fynfyn.top/health`

The public MCP endpoint currently requires no account, API key, or OAuth token. It is rate-limited. Fyn exposes one tool: `search_properties`.
